title: Installing Microsoft Office from the Office 365 Portal
body: Direct Portal method: From your computer, go to the Office 365 Portal https://portal.office.com/account Login with your NetID. Click on the Install Office button . You should then be able to download, and install MS Office. Alternative method: Log into Outlook email on the web https://email.wisc.edu Click your initials (upper right corner) Select View account , then click Office apps (left side column) Also see: Office 365 - Downloading/Install Microsoft Office https://kb.wisc.edu/page.php?id=43841 Software - UW-Madison provides no-charge software through our Campus Software Library and low-cost software at the DoIT Tech Store. http://it.wisc.edu/services/software/ Microsoft Office for UW-Owned and Personally-Owned Computers at UW-Madison (licensing infomation) https://kb.wisc.edu/page.php?id=27971
